title: stenochlaena variabilis
intro: Stenochlaena variabilis, also known as the variable polypody or variable fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Australia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenochlaena variabilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
